causal_question: Among activists who go into exile in month index 56, what is the change in their monthly share of tweets about foreign-led policy topics in the month after exile versus the month before, compared with contemporaneous activists who stayed in-country?
vague_question: When activists leave the country to live abroad, does the share of their tweets about foreign-led policy topics change right after they leave compared with just before, and how does that compare with activists who stay?
